rows.label: qev025804_MSG0001
rows.name:
This "Miracle Water" is a scam...
No... To be precise, it's nothing more than an antidote
that neutralizes a specific toxin![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0002
rows.name:
Please open your eyes, everyone!
The God of Miracles does not exist![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0003
rows.name:
Foolish...
To blaspheme our god with such fabrications...
Since you're so confident, do you have any proof?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0004
rows.name:
Proof...?
Do YOU have proof?!
Proof that something invisible actually exists![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0005
rows.name:
The Ma-non who have been healed by the "Miracle Water"
are the greatest proof of all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0006
rows.name:
Isn't that right, everyone?
You all certainly feel the presence of the God of Miracles, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0007
rows.name:
No matter how many times Dr. Staccata examined me, it was no use...
But Jilinbo's illness was cured thanks to God, wasn't it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0008
rows.name:
Jilinbo believes in the God of Miracles over Ma-non technology, you know!
Fraisie is a savior who cured my illness with the power of the God of Miracles, isn't she![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0009
rows.name: This can't be...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0010
rows.name: Do you understand now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0011
rows.name:
What the Ma-non people need is not you,
but our god.
Now, leave this place at once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0040
rows.name: Maluttet, escort them out...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain what happened to Maluttet and that she will not be returning.

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0020
rows.name: Display

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0021
rows.name: Show her the medicine bottle Maluttet dropped.

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0012
rows.name:
Wh-... Cornered, she drank that medicine and...
She died, you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0013
rows.name:
Th-that can't be!
I didn't give her the medicine bottle for that reason...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0014
rows.name:
Wha-... That's the medicine bottle I gave to Maluttet...
Why do you have it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0015
rows.name:
You arrived at the perfect time!
I couldn't wait for you, so I ended up starting the argument, you see.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0016
rows.name:
Please lend me that medicine bottle.
I'll expose her conspiracy right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0017
rows.name: Fraisie! You just admitted that this belonged to Maluttet, didn't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0018
rows.name:
Now, what happens when you drink this medicine...
Look closely, everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ugh... Nngh...
This is a special poison created from Assassin Springtails
that only affects Ma-non...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0020
rows.name:
You dumped this into Biahno Lake, making the Ma-non
who drank the water fall ill...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0021
rows.name:
And then, uugh...
When they drank this "Miracle Water"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0022
rows.name:
It made it look as though they were cured
by the power of the "God of Miracles"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0023
rows.name:
Wh-... What?!
That's a total scam, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0024
rows.name:
Hey! Fraisie!
Is what Dr. Staccata said true?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0025
rows.name:
That is nonsense!
Staccata surely fabricated that medicine himself to...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0030
rows.name: Testify

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0031
rows.name: State that Fraisie and Maluttet's fingerprints should be on the medicine bottle.

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0040
rows.name: Surmise

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0041
rows.name: Suggest that searching the church should uncover similar medicine.

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0026
rows.name: Nngh... That's... impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0027
rows.name:
Then let's collect fingerprints immediately!
That will resolve everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0028
rows.name: Nngh... That's... impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0029
rows.name:
Then let's search the church immediately!
That will resolve everything![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0030
rows.name:
Ah... Aah...
Damn it... Maluttet...
Screwing up at the most important moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0031
rows.name:
Aaaaaaaaaaah!
God of Miracles, burn these fools away with your light!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0032
rows.name:
Staccata... and you, Earthling!
You are a threat to God!
I will absolutely purge you from this world![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0033
rows.name:
Phew... Well, that's case closed, isn't it.
This is all thanks to you, you know?
Please, take this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0034
rows.name:
I am convinced after this incident.
Believing in the unseen is simply wrong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0035
rows.name:
The Ma-non, who have lived up until now without possessing a god,
were correct all along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0036
rows.name:
As a physician, Staccata intends to continue protecting the Ma-non
from such mistakes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0051
rows.name: Support Staccata's opinion.

rows.label: qev025804_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025804_SEL0061
rows.name: Argue that not everything is a scam like Fraisie's.

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0037
rows.name:
I'm glad we share the same opinion.
Let's continue to correct the mistakes in NLA together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0038
rows.name:
You're saying such transcendent beings actually exist somewhere...?
Staccata simply cannot understand it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025804_MSG0039
rows.name:
If you say so,
I would like to investigate properly before making a judgment.[ST:wait ]
